howItWorks.intro: This pet insurance value calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Lifetime Cost
rules.explanation: Total premiums over the pet's expected remaining life.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates based on standard formulas. Verify with current local data for your specific situation.

faq.a: For breeds prone to health issues, insurance often pays for itself. For healthy breeds, a savings account may be better.

faq.q: When should I get pet insurance?
faq.a: As young as possible — pre-existing conditions are never covered.
